pr-evidence/release-evidence-actions-sid.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings; reviewer verified local planning, validation, bundling, and target-record plumbing plus a fail-closed missing-sidecar check.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -q -> 55 passed
poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -> 46 passed
what_changed: Made engine connector action descriptors first-class release evidence artifacts for vLLM and SGLang.
Updated release evidence, preflight, and release bundle validation to require one action sidecar per release backend alongside native probe records.
Updated benchmark-plan generation and Databricks engine-probe target records to emit and consume actions_output_json paths, including legacy CLI passthrough.
pr-evidence/release-evidence-actions-sid.why: Release readiness needs to prove not only native KV connector probing but also the reserve/copy/bind/release action descriptors that serving integrations will consume.
